{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of the Sandviper
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Path of the Sandviper]] is a path available to artists.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
